_score_injection_doc: No INJECTION_PROOF block was present in this dev dispatch prompt; per the score-injection echo contract fail-safe, all four fields are set to null and no values fabricated.

tasks_completed.changes: Inserted 12-line test method after test_writes_valid_sentinel_file (line 186), before test_fails_without_session_id (line 188). Strips both CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID from env, then sets only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, verifying the fallback branch of _resolve_sid() resolves correctly.
tasks_completed.rationale: Prior cycle dev-20260529-081000 fixed the negative test to strip both SID vars (commit f551a24). Codex found the positive fallback path lacked coverage; deferred as Won't Have in that cycle and addressed here.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: f551a24 fix(hooks): strip CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID from env in test_fails_without_session_id
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: The prior cycle fixed the negative test (test_fails_without_session_id) to correctly strip CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, but deferred adding a positive test for the CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID-only fallback path as Won't Have. The fallback branch (env_sid = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_SESSION_ID','') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID','')) had no positive coverage.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Adds a test that strips CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and sets only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, then asserts rc==0 and data['sid']=='test-code-session-abc', directly exercising the fallback branch.

blast_radius_declarations.reason: SMALL tier — single test file addition; blast_radius_map_path=null per BA context JSON; no cross-module import surface.

AC2.note: Was 15 before this cycle; now 16 after adding the new test method

self_verification.notes: Both AC1 and AC2 verified by running pytest directly. Codex review returned all OBSERVATION_ONLY findings with no blockers.

dev.qa_notes: Run both AC1 and AC2 pytest commands. The new test must appear as PASSED and the total count must be 16. No other files were modified.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 4 OBSERVATION_ONLY findings, all confirming correctness. Specifically: (1) no blocker found in the test method; (2) both pytest runs verified locally by Codex as passing; (3) TemporaryDirectory/patch.dict nesting satisfies BA constraint (BLOCKER #1 from prior cycle); (4) no scope drift in the diff.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: No changes required — all findings were OBSERVATION_ONLY with no PROPOSED_FIX. Implementation is confirmed correct by Codex adversarial review.

recommendations: No additional recommendations — single minimal test method addition, all ACs verified.
